title: DIY Makeup Vanity Desk
summary: Need a special place to get beautified?
description: Need a special place to get beautified? Build this DIY Makeup Vanity Desk to help get you ready for the day. This vanity desk is the perfect addition to your bedroom.

steps.title: Assemble Desk Legs
steps.body: Attach the (24") 2x2s to the (15") 2x2s using a Kreg Jig on a 1 1/2" setting, with 2 1/2" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue. There should be a 3" spacing from the bottom of the floor to the bottom horizontal 2x2. Repeat this step for the other side of the desk. Note: The pocket holes on the 2x2s should face down on the bottom 2x2 and up on the top 2x2.

steps.title: Attach Desk Legs
steps.body:
Attach the (38 1/2") 2x2 to the two assembled desk sides using a Kreg Jig on a 1 1/2" setting, with 2 1/2" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue.
There should be a 3" spacing from the bottom of the floor to the bottom horizontal 2x2.
Note: The pocket holes on the 2x2s should face down on the bottom 2x2 and up on the top 2x2.

steps.title: Attach Front Stretcher
steps.body:
Attach the (38 1/2") 2x2s to the assembled desk base using a Kreg Jig on a 1 1/2" setting, with 2 1/2" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue.
Note: The pocket holes on the 2x2s should be facing up.

steps.title: Assemble Desk Top
steps.body:
Attach the (41 1/2") 1x6 to the (18"x 41 1/2") plywood board using a Kreg Jig on a 3/4" setting, with 1 1/4" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue.
The 1x6 should be flush with the back of the plywood board.

steps.title: Add Desktop Dividers
steps.body:
Attach the (17 1/4")1x6 dividers to the plywood sheet using a Kreg Jig on a 3/4" setting, with 1 1/4" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue.
The two outer spacings should measure 13" and the middle spacing should measure 12 1/2".

steps.title: Add in Drawer Slides
steps.body: Add in 12 in. Drawer slides to the three openings. Drawer slides should be inset 3/4".

steps.title: Build Outer Drawer Frame
steps.body: Attach the (15 3/4") 1x3 to the (10 1/2") 1x3 using a Kreg Jig on a 3/4" setting, with 1 1/4" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue.

steps.title: Attach Outer Drawer Backing
steps.body: Attach the (11 1/2 x 15 3/4") backing to the bottom of the drawer with a staple gun and 1" staples.

steps.title: Build Inner Drawer Frame
steps.body: Attach the (15 3/4") 1x3 to the (10") 1x3 using a Kreg Jig on a 3/4" setting, with 1 1/4" Pocket Hole Screws to attach along with Wood Glue.

steps.title: Attach Inner Drawer Backing
steps.body: Attach the (11 1/2 x 15 3/4") backing to the bottom of the drawer with a staple gun and 1" staples.

steps.title: Attach Table Top
steps.body: Attach the (18" x 41 1/2") table top tp the desk using a countersink bit and 2" wood screws and fill the holes with wood filler.

steps.title: Attach Drawer Fronts
steps.body: Attach the drawer fronts to the drawers using wood screws and then attach the desk door knobs to the center of the desk door fronts.

steps.title: Attach Desk top
steps.body: Attach the desk top to the desk base by driving 2" screws up through the desk base into the bottom of the desk top.

steps.title: Visit Handmade-Haven.com
steps.body: For finish details and extra helpful tips visit https://handmade-haven.com/blogs/news/diy-vanity-desk.

steps.title: Attach Slides to Drawers
steps.body: Attach the other part of the drawer slide to the bottom of the drawers using the provided screws.
